ModMetaData.name: AI Portrait Forge
ModMetaData.author: sitariom
ModMetaData.description: AI-generated portraits for ANY pawn — humans, animals, mechs, creatures, and all modded races. Powered by cloud AI APIs: pick from 40 art styles, 6 providers, and 22 creature-specific prompt templates. Automatic background removal with transparent PNG output. No GPU or local model downloads needed — just an API key and right-click any pawn. Features: customizable positive & negative prompts, per-category templates, API key manager, Test Connection, pixel-art fallback avatars, mod support for 50+ content packs. Inspired by Avatar - Personas (Meathax).
